inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 loss from operations $145.9M / 219.7M shares; excludes $390.7M other income from warrant/forward-contract marks (S-1/A)
inputs.normalization_note: GAAP net income $237.8M and positive operating cash flow in 2024 were driven by customer deposits and fair-value gains, not normalized owner cash. FY2025 operating cash flow was -$10.1M and investing cash outflow was -$667.6M for cloud inference buildout.

ai_overlay.status: partial — OpenAI MRA and AWS term sheet in option scan; not in Lawrence FCF₀
not_in_model_requires_refresh: OpenAI 750MW deployment schedule and MRA termination clawback
AWS binding term sheet conversion to recognized cloud revenue
WSE-4 tape-out timing and gross-margin bridge vs NVIDIA Blackwell

capex_stress_2026.ocf_assumption_note: [Assumption] FY2026 cloud buildout keeps operating cash flow near breakeven while investing outflows remain elevated
capex_stress_2026.capex_source: FY2025 investing cash outflow $667.6M; partial repeat for inference capacity [Assumption]

ai_inflection_bull.fcf_y0_note: [Assumption] FY2028 normalized if OpenAI/AWS revenue converts and cloud gross margin expands above 45%
ai_inflection_bull.drivers: OpenAI MRA conversion, AWS hyperscaler ramp, inference TAM share

segments.label: Hardware (on-prem wafer-scale systems)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: Hardware gross profit $153.7M less allocated R&D/S&M [Assumption]; S-1/A FY2025
segments.notes: FY2025 hardware revenue $358.4M (+69% YoY); MBZUAI concentration

segments.label: Cloud and other services (inference capacity)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: Cloud gross profit $45.4M less data-center capex drag $667M allocated [Assumption]
segments.notes: FY2025 cloud revenue $151.6M (+94% YoY); AWS/OpenAI optionality

options.label: OpenAI master revenue agreement and warrant
options.base_terminal_rationale: MRA valued at >$20B press; 40% probability of $8B NPV equivalent in overlay base [Assumption]
options.evidence: S-1/A: OpenAI 750MW deployment; $1.0B working-capital loan; 33.4M Class N warrant shares

options.label: AWS hyperscaler inference partnership
options.base_terminal_rationale: Binding term sheet March 2026; revenue path embedded in cloud segment growth, not separate terminal
options.evidence: S-1/A business section: AWS first hyperscaler to deploy Cerebras in data centers

options.label: Warrant and forward-contract mark-to-market
options.base_terminal_rationale: Explicit zero — $390.7M other income in FY2025 is non-recurring fair-value accounting, not owner cash
options.evidence: S-1/A: other income (expense) net $390.7M drove GAAP net income $237.8M

segment_build.notes: Segment sum illustrative; Lawrence consolidated gate uses normalized -$0.66/sh owner cash

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Semiconductor developer; assets reflect cash, inventory, and PP&E at cost

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Cloud buildout and R&D drag; FY2025 loss from operations $145.9M

option_scan.question: Backlog not in cash path?
option_scan.evidence: AWS term sheet and OpenAI capacity not fully in FY2025 revenue

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No holdco stakes; warrants are liabilities not hidden assets

option_scan.question: Transitory recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Growth story is structural inference demand, not one-time catch-up

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Cloud inference already in revenue $151.6M; AWS/OpenAI upside in growth path

bear.notes: MBZUAI/G42 concentration persists; OpenAI MRA delayed; cloud capex with no margin recovery

base.notes: Diversification via AWS/OpenAI; operating loss narrows to positive owner cash by year 5 [Assumption]

bull.notes: OpenAI MRA fully converts; AWS becomes top-3 customer; inference share gains vs GPU

marvin_floor.notes: FY2025 operating loss per share; filings only

blended_best.notes: No approved third-party blend; Marvin floor only

growth_explanation.mechanism: Inference workload mix shift from training to low-latency serving; OpenAI and AWS partnerships diversify beyond UAE strategic partners

falsifiers.observation: MBZUAI share stays above 50% of revenue
OpenAI MRA termination triggers $1.0B loan clawback
Cloud gross margin stays below 30% after capex cycle

theory_implied.derivation: segment_build owner-cash weighted blend (growth only; exit from scenarios.base)

overlay_results.notes: [Assumption] FY2028 normalized if OpenAI/AWS revenue converts and cloud gross margin expands above 45%

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
